fields.description:
About The Team

OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity.

The Global Events team is a dynamic and ethos-driven group dedicated to crafting one-of-a-kind and extraordinary experiences that encompass OpenAI’s values and mission. Our team is driven by a deep passion for shining the spotlight on others and bringing people together to connect in meaningful ways. We turn complex ideas into experiences that thousands of people can see, feel, and remember.

We move fast, experiment often, and care deeply about craft. The details matter here — the pacing of a keynote, the moment a demo lands, the way a room feels when something important is revealed.

If you love the magic of live production and the puzzle of making complicated things look effortless, you’ll feel at home here.

About the Role

We’re looking for an exceptional Senior Event Producer to join the Global Events team at OpenAI — someone who thrives in the controlled chaos of live production and knows how to turn ambitious ideas into beautifully executed experiences.

In this role, you’ll help bring some of OpenAI’s most visible moments to life — including our annual flagship conference, OpenAI DevDay. You will also work on other large- and medium-scale events ranging from global launches, product-driven experiences, enterprise events, and entirely new formats we haven’t invented yet. You’ll partner closely with teams across product, marketing, research, and communications to translate big ideas into real-world productions that feel seamless, thoughtful, and distinctly OpenAI.

As a Senior Producer, you’ll own the full production lifecycle — shaping concepts, building plans, managing vendors and partners, running timelines, and ensuring every detail lands with precision. This role sits at the intersection of creativity and operational excellence: equal parts builder, problem-solver, and calm presence when the stakes are high.

Our team takes pride in craft, notices the small things others miss, and moves fast without sacrificing quality. The ideal candidate brings strong experience in live production, stage management, or agency-side event production, along with a curiosity about AI and how it will shape the way people gather, learn, and connect.

This role is based in San Francisco, CA, with a hybrid schedule (three days per week in office). Relocation support is available. Regular travel is expected (~30%).

In this role, you will:

 - Oversee production for OpenAI’s flagship conference, OpenAI DevDay, owning major production workstreams including event flow, stage production, vendors, and onsite execution. You will skillfully manage and direct cross-functional teams, vendors, and other stakeholders.

 - Lead cross-functional production meetings and stakeholder syncs, ensuring clear ownership, accountability, and progress across all workstreams. You will track deliverables against timelines, keep teams aligned on priorities, and drive stakeholders to meet key milestones in an organized, scalable way.

 - Collaborate on event execution strategies: partner with event managers and business DRIs to shape event plans, align on vision, objectives, and goals to deliver impactful experiences.

 - Manage stage productions: oversee content production, stage management, and AV coordination, ensuring all aspects of stage execution — from rehearsals to live production — run seamlessly.

 - Support creative production: collaborate with creative teams to bring bold ideas to life, ensuring the vision is translated into every detail of the event. Manage creative vendors and partners onsite to deliver exceptional experiences.

 - Source and negotiate vendors: identify and secure top-tier vendors, agencies, and suppliers, negotiate contracts, and build lasting partnerships.

 - Oversee risk management and contingency planning : secure necessary permits and insurance while managing risks and resolving onsite issues to keep events running smoothly.

 - Track budgets and financials: manage event production budgets meticulously, track expenses, and ensure events stay within allocated limits.

 - Define production strategies and operational frameworks that allow complex events to scale smoothly.

 - Oversee detailed production timelines, project workbacks, and cross-team coordination.

You might thrive in this role if you have:

 - Have 10+ years of experience in production / stage management, event production, agency event management / production, or similar roles.

 - Experience producing large-scale conferences, product launches, or live productions with significant operational and technical complexity. We’re looking for experience leading on-stage and screen-based production for high-attendance events (1,000+), where precision, pacing, and audience experience are paramount.

 - Have a proven track record of managing multi-million dollar budgets.

 - Bring empathy and humor to high-pressure environments.

 - Are equal parts strategist and find joy in organizational wizardry, and operational excellence.

 - Find deep value in bringing your whole self to work, celebrating differences in perspectives, and prioritize bringing joy to the front of your projects.

 - Thrive in fast-paced environments and enjoy working across multiple events. You bring calm energy to chaotic moments and know how to keep a team moving forward when things get complicated.

 - Care about the craft of live production — the pacing of a show, the feel of a room, the small details most people never notice..

 - A strong working knowledge of full-stack event production including: conference and meeting planning, registration, attendee journey, stage production, immersive-activations, and catering.

 - Are equal parts builder, problem-solver, and collaborator. You can move from strategic planning to tactical execution without losing momentum.

 - A hunger and desire to innovate, while holding true to brand values.

 - Enjoy working with brilliant but busy stakeholders and know how to guide them toward great outcomes.

 - Enjoy finding innovative ways to use OpenAI tools and products to scale your team’s work.

 - Show a deep interest in artificial intelligence that benefits all of humanity.

About OpenAI

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. We push the boundaries of the capabilities of AI systems and seek to safely deploy them to the world through our products. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core, and to achieve our mission, we must encompass and value the many different perspectives, voices, and experiences that form the full spectrum of humanity. 

We are an equal opportunity employer, and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or other applicable legally protected characteristic.

For additional information, please see OpenAI’s Affirmative Action and Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement https://cdn.openai.com/policies/eeo-policy-statement.pdf.

Background checks for applicants will be administered in accordance with applicable law, and qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment consistent with those laws, including the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act, for US-based candidates. For unincorporated Los Angeles County workers: we reasonably believe that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship with the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of a conditional offer of employment: protect computer hardware entrusted to you from theft, loss or damage; return all computer hardware in your possession (including the data contained therein) upon termination of employment or end of assignment; and maintain the confidentiality of proprietary, confidential, and non-public information. In addition, job duties require access to secure and protected information technology systems and related data security obligations.

To notify OpenAI that you believe this job posting is non-compliant, please submit a report through this form https://form.asana.com/?d=57018692298241&k=5MqR40fZd7jlxVUh5J-UeA. No response will be provided to inquiries unrelated to job posting compliance.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with disabilities, and requests can be made via this link https://form.asana.com/?k=bQ7w9h3iexRlicUdWRiwvg&d=57018692298241.

OpenAI Global Applicant Privacy Policy https://cdn.openai.com/policies/global-employee-and-contractor-privacy-policy.pdf

At OpenAI, we believe artificial intelligence has the potential to help people solve immense global challenges, and we want the upside of AI to be widely shared. Join us in shaping the future of technology.
fields.title: Senior Producer,  Global Events
